title: Atlantic Mail
description: Maiden transatlantic crossing aboard SS Pemberton. Liverpool to New York, 7 days.

content.plain_text: MPB DE GLD QRV K
content.decoded_meaning: Liverpool station calling: Are you ready?

correct_responses: GLD DE MPB QRV K
GLD DE MPB R K

content.plain_text: QTR 1000 GMT AR
content.decoded_meaning: Time signal: 10:00 GMT

content.plain_text: GLD DE MVS QTH 53N 005W K
content.decoded_meaning: Saint Brendan reporting position to Liverpool

content.plain_text: WX IRISH SEA CLEAR WIND SW 3 AR
content.decoded_meaning: Weather report: Irish Sea clear, southwest wind force 3

content.plain_text: MPB DE GCK QTH K
content.decoded_meaning: Crookhaven station requesting position

correct_responses: GCK DE MPB QTH 52N 009W K
GCK DE MPB QTH 52N 010W K

content.plain_text: MPB DE GCK MSG NR 1 FOR HARTLEY = ARRIVING NY FRIDAY BRING CONTRACTS = WILSON
content.decoded_meaning: Passenger telegram for Mr. Hartley from Wilson

correct_responses: GCK DE MPB QSL MSG NR 1 K

content.plain_text: CQ DE MRA QTH 50N 012W BOUND NEW YORK K
content.decoded_meaning: Caronia calling all stations with position, bound for New York

content.plain_text: WX ATLANTIC CLOUDY WIND W 4 STORM WARNING 48HRS AR
content.decoded_meaning: Atlantic weather: cloudy, west wind force 4, storm expected in 48 hours

content.plain_text: CQ DE MPA QTH 49N 025W K
content.decoded_meaning: Mauretania calling all stations with position

content.plain_text: MPB DE MPA QSL MSG NR 2 RELAYED AR
content.decoded_meaning: Mauretania confirms: message number 2 has been relayed

content.plain_text: MPB DE MBC QTH 48N 028W WX K
content.decoded_meaning: Baltic asking Pemberton for weather conditions

correct_responses: MBC DE MPB WX CLOUDY WIND W 4 K
MBC DE MPB QRK 4 WX CLOUDY K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MPA MSG NR 3 FOR CAPT = CONGRATULATIONS PROMOTION SAFE CROSSING = CUNARD
content.decoded_meaning: Passenger telegram for Captain: congratulations on promotion

correct_responses: MPA DE MPB QSL MSG NR 3 TNX K
MPA DE MPB QSL MSG NR 3 K

content.plain_text: CQ DE MCE QRN SEVERE STORM 47N 035W AR
content.decoded_meaning: Cape Race warns: severe atmospheric interference, storm at 47N 035W

content.plain_text: CQ DE MLQ QTH 47N 038W GALE FORCE 8 K
content.decoded_meaning: Dorina reports: gale force 8 at position 47N 38W

content.plain_text: SOS SOS SOS DE MKC QTH 46N 040W TAKING WATER K
content.decoded_meaning: DISTRESS: SS Dorian taking on water at 46N 40W, requires assistance

correct_responses: MKC DE MPB QTH 47N 037W QSL SOS K
MKC DE MPB QSL SOS K
MKC DE MPB R SOS K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MCE QSL SOS MKC RESCUE DISPATCHED AR
content.decoded_meaning: Cape Race confirms: SOS from Dorian received, rescue dispatched

content.plain_text: CQ DE MKC CREW SAFE IN BOATS AWAITING RESCUE AR
content.decoded_meaning: Dorian update: crew safe in lifeboats, awaiting rescue

content.plain_text: WX STORM ABATING WIND NW 5 SEA IMPROVING AR
content.decoded_meaning: Weather update: storm abating, northwest wind force 5, seas improving

content.plain_text: MPB DE MCE QTH K
content.decoded_meaning: Cape Race requesting position from Pemberton

correct_responses: MCE DE MPB QTH 45N 050W K
MCE DE MPB QTH 44N 050W K

content.plain_text: SECURITE DE MCE ICE 44N 049W LARGE BERG AR
content.decoded_meaning: Safety warning: large iceberg reported at 44N 49W

content.plain_text: CQ DE MRA FOG DENSE QTH 43N 055W K
content.decoded_meaning: Caronia reports: dense fog at position 43N 55W

content.plain_text: MPB DE MCE MSG NR 4 FOR HARTLEY = NY OFFICE CONFIRMED MEETING MONDAY = WILSON
content.decoded_meaning: Passenger telegram for Hartley: NY office confirmed Monday meeting

correct_responses: MCE DE MPB QSL MSG NR 4 K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MSH QRV QTH K
content.decoded_meaning: Sandy Hook calling: are you ready? Report position.

correct_responses: MSH DE MPB QRV QTH 42N 065W K
MSH DE MPB QTH 42N 065W K

content.plain_text: WX NEW YORK CLEAR WIND N 2 VISIBILITY GOOD AR
content.decoded_meaning: New York weather: clear, north wind force 2, good visibility

content.plain_text: CQ DE MPA QTH 41N 070W ETA NEW YORK 0800 K
content.decoded_meaning: Mauretania reporting position, ETA New York at 08:00

content.plain_text: MPB DE MSH MSG NR 5 FOR CAPT = DOCK 12 BERTH A ASSIGNED = NY HARBOR
content.decoded_meaning: Message for Captain: Dock 12, Berth A assigned at New York Harbor

correct_responses: MSH DE MPB QSL MSG NR 5 K
MSH DE MPB QSL MSG NR 5 TNX K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MSH QSY 512 K
content.decoded_meaning: Sandy Hook instructs: change frequency to 512 kHz

correct_responses: MSH DE MPB QSY 512 QSL K
MSH DE MPB QSL K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MSH PILOT 40N 074W CHANNEL CLEAR AR
content.decoded_meaning: Pilot station at 40N 74W, channel is clear for approach

content.plain_text: MPB DE MSH MSG NR 6 FOR HARTLEY = WELCOME TO NEW YORK = WILSON
content.decoded_meaning: Final passenger telegram: Welcome to New York

correct_responses: MSH DE MPB QSL MSG NR 6 K
MSH DE MPB QSL MSG NR 6 TNX K

content.plain_text: MSH DE MPB TNX QSO SK
content.decoded_meaning: Pemberton closing station: thanks for contact, end of transmission

content.plain_text: MPB DE GLD QRU MSG FOR CAPTAIN CONFIRM BERTH NR 4 SOUTHAMPTON K
content.decoded_meaning: Seaforth Radio: confirm berth number 4 Southampton for Captain

correct_responses: GLD DE MPB QSL BERTH NR 4 CONFIRMED K
GLD DE MPB QSL K

content.plain_text: MPB DE WCC MSG NR 12 FOR PURSER = COAL BUNKERS READY SOUTHAMPTON = SHORE AGENT
content.decoded_meaning: Chatham Radio: telegram for Purser, coal bunkers ready at Southampton

correct_responses: WCC DE MPB QSL MSG NR 12 K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MFA XXX ENGINE TROUBLE QTH 46N 028W REQUEST POSITION NEAREST PORT K
content.decoded_meaning: SS Falmouth: engine trouble, requests nearest port from Pemberton

correct_responses: MFA DE MPB QTH AZORES 38N 028W PONTA DELGADA 200NM K
MFA DE MPB AZORES NEAREST K

content.plain_text: MPB DE GCK QRU MSG NR 15 FOR DR HAYES = PATIENT CONDITION STABLE ARRIVE SOONEST = LONDON HOSPITAL
content.decoded_meaning: Crookhaven Radio: urgent medical message for Dr Hayes — patient stable

correct_responses: GCK DE MPB QSL MSG NR 15 K

content.plain_text: MPB DE MSH QSA QRN CONFIRM POSITION AND ETA SOUTHAMPTON K
content.decoded_meaning: Sandy Hook Radio: poor signal, confirm position and ETA Southampton

correct_responses: MSH DE MPB QTH 50N 010W ETA SOUTHAMPTON 2 DAYS K
MSH DE MPB ETA 2 DAYS K

content.plain_text: GLD DE MVK QTH 52N 006W DEST LIVERPOOL ETA 1400 AR
content.decoded_meaning: SS Kilkenny reporting position, bound Liverpool ETA 14:00

content.plain_text: MRC DE MCS QSO PSE QTH ES WX K
content.decoded_meaning: Celtic Star calling Mauretania: request your position and weather

content.plain_text: MCS DE MRC QTH 50N 018W WX CLEAR BRZ NW 2 K
content.decoded_meaning: Mauretania: position 50N 18W, clear weather, NW breeze force 2

content.plain_text: CQ DE WCC WX ADVISORY GALE WARNING N ATLANTIC 50N AR
content.decoded_meaning: Chatham Radio weather advisory: gale warning north Atlantic above 50N

content.plain_text: WCC DE MTZ QTH 44N 045W DEST SOUTHAMPTON 3 DAYS K
content.decoded_meaning: SS Montezuma reporting position: 44N 45W, bound Southampton in 3 days

content.plain_text: CQ CQ DE WSL QRN NIGHT SKED 500 KHZ AR
content.decoded_meaning: Sea Gate Radio New York: night schedule on 500 kHz — signal carries far tonight

content.plain_text: MPB DE MCS MSG NR 7 FOR PEMBERTON CAPT = GOOD NIGHT SIGNALS CLEAR = CELTIC STAR
content.decoded_meaning: Night passenger telegram — ionosphere bouncing signals clearly across the Atlantic

correct_responses: MCS DE MPB QSL MSG NR 7 K
MCS DE MPB QSL K

content.plain_text: CQ DE WSL WX NEW YORK CLEAR WIND NW 2 AR
content.decoded_meaning: New York weather at midnight: clear, light northwest wind — ionospheric skip bringing this far

content.plain_text: GLD DE MPA QTH 51N 015W 500 PAX ALL WELL ETA 0600 K
content.decoded_meaning: Mauretania: 500 passengers, all well, ETA Liverpool 06:00

content.plain_text: MPB DE GCK MSG NR 8 FOR STEWARD = PROVISIONS AT NY DOCK 12 CONFIRMED = CUNARD
content.decoded_meaning: Telegram for Steward: provisioning at New York Dock 12 confirmed

correct_responses: GCK DE MPB QSL MSG NR 8 K

content.plain_text: CQ DE WCC NIGHT QTC HEAVY TRAFFIC 500 K
content.decoded_meaning: Chatham Radio: busy night schedule on 500 kHz, signals bouncing from Europe

content.plain_text: MPB DE MBC MSG NR 9 FOR HARTLEY = LONDON OFFICE URGENT REPLY NEEDED = WILSON
content.decoded_meaning: Urgent passenger telegram for Hartley via Baltic — night skip carrying signal

correct_responses: MBC DE MPB QSL MSG NR 9 K

content.plain_text: CQ CQ DE WSL QST ICE REPORTS 43N 049W TO 45N 052W AR
content.decoded_meaning: Sea Gate Radio New York broadcast: ice field reports 43-45N, 49-52W

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Welcome aboard Pemberton, Sparks. We are bound for New York, 7 days across the Atlantic.
Keep a sharp ear on 500 kHz. Report anything unusual to the bridge.

dialog.speaker: Chief Officer
lines: You hear that, Sparks? Stations from America — at this distance!
At night the signal bounces off the ionosphere. During the day we reach maybe 500 miles. Tonight we can hear 3000.
The Marconi men call it the night effect. Use it well.

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Sparks, I see that storm warning. Keep monitoring for updates. We may need to alter course.

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Good work relaying that SOS, Sparks. The Dorian crew may owe their lives to your quick work.

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Sparks, did you miss a distress call? The bridge received reports of an SOS from the Dorian. Stay sharp.

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Ice reported ahead. We will reduce speed. Keep listening for updated positions.

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Land ho! Long Island ahead. Send our ETA to Sandy Hook and prepare to close the station.

dialog.speaker: Captain
lines: Well done, Sparks. We have arrived safely in New York. Your work at the key was first rate.
